title: Pan-Seared Uni with Pungent Gratin
description: A delicate Norwegian-inspired dish featuring seared uni topped with a pungent gratin.
instructions: Season the uni with salt and pepper.
Heat butter in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add pungent and cook for 1 minute.
Add white wine and cook until reduced by half, about 2 minutes.
Add lemon juice and cook for an additional minute.
Add uni to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until cooked through.
Transfer the uni to a plate and top with a spoonful of the pungent gratin.
To make the gratin, mix parmesan cheese and flour in a bowl.
Add heavy cream to the bowl and mix until smooth.
Pour the gratin mixture over the uni and serve immediately.
